checkbox.name: Custom UI
checkbox.desc: Enable/Disable The Custom UI Made For Neo.

menu.name: Monster Options
menu.desc: Modify Things Related To Monster Songs.

menu.name: Glitch Shader Options

number.name: Glitch Shader Multi
